admin.title: Import a forum
admin.intro: Migrate an existing forum into Flarum. Pick your source platform, connect to its database, test it, then run the import in the background — it processes in batches with a live progress bar, so even large forums won't time out.
admin.dump_help: A mysqldump .sql (optionally gzipped) or a SQLite file. Very large forums may exceed your host's upload limit — use the live connection instead, or gzip the dump first.
admin.upload_failed: Upload failed — the file may be too large for this server's upload limit.
admin.confirm_start: Start importing now? This writes discussions, posts and members into this forum. Import into a fresh forum for best results.
admin.shared_note: Runs in small batches straight from your browser — no queue worker or SSH needed, so it works on shared hosting. Keep this tab open; if it's interrupted, reopen this page and it resumes where it left off.
